pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 17 migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as the baseline; using Spring Boot 2.x with Java 17 is unsupported and may lead to runtime incompatibilities or missing features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 17 to target the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run against Java 17; keeping the property at 11 would result in incorrect compiler flags and potential runtime issues on a JDK 17 environment.

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Migrate servlet API import from javax to jakarta namespace to comply with Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.servlet does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments used by Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Migrate servlet API import from javax to jakarta namespace for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3; using javax causes ClassNotFoundException at runtime or compilation errors if the javax dependency is absent.

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Replace javax.websocket imports with jakarta.websocket to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.why_exists: Import statement not found; javax.websocket package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3, causing compilation failure.

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Replace javax.websocket imports with jakarta.websocket to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.why_exists: Import javax.websocket.* cannot be resolved on the classpath as the javax.websocket-api artifact has been removed in favor of jakarta.websocket-api in Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation.Nonnull with jakarta.annotation.Nonnull to align with Jakarta EE namespace in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.why_exists: javax.annotation package is removed in Java 17+ and Spring Boot 3; using it causes a compile error (package not found).

src/test/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 import with JUnit 5 import to align with Spring Boot 3's default testing framework.
src/test/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 requires JUnit 5; JUnit 4 classes like org.junit.Test are no longer on the classpath by default, causing compilation errors.
